	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_FEC5
	mov A, #00h	;   0
	movx @DPTR, A
	inc DPTR
	mov A, #3Fh	;  63 '?'
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_FEC4
	clr A
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_FEC3
	mov A, #04h	;   4
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov R0, #06h	;   6
	mov R1, #0E8h	; 232  -24 'è'
	mov R2, 06h
	mov R3, #0FFh	; 255   -1 'ÿ'
	mov R4, #0FFh	; 255   -1 'ÿ'
	mov R5, #01h	;   1
	lcall jump_E0AF
	jnc jump_0516
	ljmp jump_E55A

jump_0516:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_FEC7
	mov A, #01h	;   1
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_FEC3
	movx A, @DPTR
	orl A, #01h	;   1
	movx @DPTR, A
jump_0523:
	jnb 22h.4, jump_0536
	mov DPTR, #dptr_FEC7
	movx A, @DPTR
	xrl A, #01h	;   1
	jz jump_053F
	mov DPTR, #dptr_FE0F
	movx A, @DPTR
	anl A, #0Ah	;  10
	jz jump_0523
jump_0536:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_FED7
	mov A, #01h	;   1
	movx @DPTR, A
	clr C
	sjmp jump_0540

jump_053F:
	setb C
jump_0540:
	jc jump_0545
	ljmp jump_E55A

jump_0545:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_FECB
	movx A, @DPTR
	orl A, #80h	; 128 -128
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_F40C
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov DPTR, #dptr_F40F
	movx A, @DPTR
	xrl A, #0Fh	;  15
	jz jump_055B
	setb C
	sjmp jump_055C

jump_055B:
	clr C
jump_055C:
	ret

	push 04h
	push 05h
	mov 83h, R6
	mov 82h, R7
jump_0565:
	mov A, R3
	jz jump_057F
	push 82h
	push 83h
	mov 83h, R4
	mov 82h, R5
	movx A, @DPTR
	inc DPTR
	mov R4, 83h
	mov R5, 82h
	pop 83h
	pop 82h
	movx @DPTR, A
	inc DPTR
	dec R3
	sjmp jump_0565

jump_057F:
	pop 05h
	pop 04h
	ret

	mov 8Ah, #00h	;   0
	mov 8Ch, #0CEh	; 206  -50 'Î'
	clr 88h.5
	mov DPTR, #dptr_EA64
	clr A
	movx @DPTR, A
	inc DPTR
	movx @DPTR, A
	setb 88h.4
jump_0595:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_EA64
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov R4, A
	inc DPTR
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov R5, A
	mov A, R4
	clr C
	subb A, R6
	jc jump_0595
	jnz jump_05A9
	mov A, R5
	clr C
	subb A, R7
	jc jump_0595
jump_05A9:
	clr 88h.4
	ret

	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop

	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	anl 44h, #2Dh	;  45 '-'
	orl A, R1
	xrl A, R6
	xrl A, R1
	mov A, #32h	;  50 '2'
	jb 24h.0, jump_081B
	acall jump_0130
	jnb 26h.0, jump_0831

end
